description: Savings & battery economics (#132). SOURCE OF TRUTH: zeus series only (Prometheus zeus_savings_today_eur; InfluxDB zeus_savings / zeus_daily_savings) — never the legacy buzzbrick_* HA sensors. Consolidates beyond Zeus — Monthly Savings & Mode (zeus-monthly-influx), which stays for mode/forecast/capacity views.

panels.title: Savings today
panels.description: Live from the optimizer: Prometheus zeus_savings_today_eur (arbitrage model, resets at local midnight).

panels.title: Last 7 days
panels.description: Sum of zeus_daily_savings.eur over the trailing 7 days (deduplicated per day: tagged + untagged points coexist since the site_id rollout).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_daily_savings" and r._field == "eur")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> sum()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Last 7 days"})

panels.title: Month to date
panels.description: Sum of zeus_daily_savings.eur since the start of the current month (Europe/Brussels).

targets.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Brussels")
from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1mo))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_daily_savings" and r._field == "eur")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> sum()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Month to date"})

panels.title: Cumulative (all time)
panels.description: Sum of zeus_daily_savings.eur over the full InfluxDB history (starts 2026-06-24).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_daily_savings" and r._field == "eur")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> sum()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Cumulative"})

panels.title: €/kWh discharged (avg of daily, range)
panels.description: Mean of the per-day ratio savings ÷ discharged kWh over the dashboard range (days with < 0.5 kWh discharged excluded). Daily values from zeus_savings last-of-day (today_eur / discharged_today_kwh, available since 2026-06-28).

targets.query:
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Brussels")
s = from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "today_eur")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "s"})
d = from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "discharged_today_kwh")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "d"})
join(tables: {s: s, d: d}, on: ["_time"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.d > 0.5)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.s / r.d}))
  |> mean()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "EUR per kWh discharged"})

panels.title: Cycled today (kWh)
panels.description: Last written intraday counters from zeus_savings (charged_today_kwh / discharged_today_kwh, reset at local midnight).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "charged_today_kwh")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Charged"})

from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "discharged_today_kwh")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Discharged"})

panels.title: Today intraday — discharge value vs charge cost vs savings (arbitrage model, last 24h)
panels.description: zeus_savings intraday counters (reset at local midnight). Arbitrage reporting mode: 'discharge value' (baseline_eur) is the would-be grid cost of the loads the battery served; 'charge cost' (actual_eur) is what charging drew from the grid; savings = value − cost (+ stored-energy credit).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "baseline_eur")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Discharge value (€)"})

from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "actual_eur")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Charge cost (€)"})

from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "today_eur")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Savings (€)"})

panels.title: Daily savings (€/day) with 30d moving average
panels.description: Bars: zeus_daily_savings.eur (one point per day, deduplicated across the site_id tag rollout). Line: trailing 30-day moving average (partial windows while history < 30d — Influx history starts 2026-06-24).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_daily_savings" and r._field == "eur")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Daily savings (€)"})

from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_daily_savings" and r._field == "eur")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> timedMovingAverage(every: 1d, period: 30d)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> first()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "30d moving average"})

panels.title: Battery throughput — charged vs discharged (kWh/day)
panels.description: Last-of-day value of the zeus_savings intraday counters (charged_today_kwh / discharged_today_kwh), stamped on the day they belong to. Counters exist since 2026-06-28; the current day is partial.

targets.query:
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Brussels")
from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "charged_today_kwh")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Charged (kWh)"})

import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Brussels")
from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "discharged_today_kwh")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Discharged (kWh)"})

panels.title: Implied economics — € saved per kWh discharged (per day)
panels.description: Per-day savings ÷ discharged kWh from zeus_savings last-of-day counters. Days with < 0.5 kWh discharged are excluded to avoid divide-by-noise. Cross-checked: last-of-day today_eur equals the zeus_daily_savings row exactly.

targets.query:
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Brussels")
s = from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "today_eur")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "s"})
d = from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "discharged_today_kwh")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "d"})
join(tables: {s: s, d: d}, on: ["_time"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.d > 0.5)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.s / r.d}))
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "€ / kWh discharged"})

panels.title: Throughput vs savings efficiency · savings split
Throughput vs savings — kWh discharged/day vs €/day (scatter)
panels.description: Each point is one day in the dashboard range: x = kWh discharged, y = € saved (zeus_savings last-of-day counters). The slope of the cloud is the realized €/kWh-cycled; flat/low points are poor-spread days.

targets.query:
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Brussels")
s = from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "today_eur")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Savings (€/day)"})
d = from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_savings" and r._field == "discharged_today_kwh")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Discharged (kWh/day)"})
join(tables: {s: s, d: d}, on: ["_time"])
  |> keep(columns: ["Discharged (kWh/day)", "Savings (€/day)"])

panels.title: Savings split — arbitrage vs capacity term (not derivable)

options.content:
**An arbitrage-vs-capacity split is NOT derivable from the persisted data — shown honestly, no synthetic split.**

Zeus runs `reporting.mode: arbitrage`: every persisted savings number — Influx `zeus_savings.today_eur`, `zeus_daily_savings.eur`, the `savings-YYYY-MM-DD.md` report line, and Prometheus `zeus_savings_today_eur` — is the **single arbitrage-model figure** (value of discharged energy − charging cost, + stored-energy credit). No capacity / peak-shaving € term is computed or persisted anywhere:

- `zeus_capacity_peak_kw` tracks the monthly peak in **kW**, not an attributed € saving;
- the daily report rows carry one `Savings: €` number, no component breakdown.

A real split would need zeus to persist a counterfactual no-battery peak alongside the actual peak (and price the delta at the capacity tariff). Until then this dashboard shows only the total.

**Reserved for #118 — VAT-adjusted savings.**

All € figures on this dashboard are at the raw day-ahead energy price zeus optimizes on. The VAT-adjusted (invoice-comparable) view lands here once zeus ships `vat_rate` and applies it to the savings series.

**Reserved for #117 — invoice reconciliation.**

Billed vs computed comparison for invoice periods (supplier invoice for the Tervuren site vs zeus-computed cost/savings). Lands here once the first Tervuren invoice covering battery operation is available.

title: Savings & Economics
